title: PCB Repair — Beissbarth Microtec 510
description: Repair of the main electronic board from a Beissbarth Microtec 510 wheel balancing machine. The board was inspected at component level, damaged electronic circuits were repaired, and the unit was cleaned, verified and prepared for reliable operation in the machine.
image_alt: Beissbarth Microtec 510 wheel balancer main board PCB repair AKEI Latvia
meta_description: Component-level PCB repair for Beissbarth Microtec 510 wheel balancing machine. AKEI workshop equipment repair in Latvia.
